result:
The verification agent confirmed 19/20 file:line references are exact. Two minor discrepancies: `run_roon_loop` is 482 lines (not 492) and `handle_cli_event` is 240 lines (not 248). All other claims — struct fields, trait definitions, line numbers, adapter line counts — are precise.

Zone struct field count (13), adapter line counts (2658/2622/2055/1077/1013), trait definitions, and all function locations verified precisely. Volume flow traced through 6 hops: UI component → page callback → HTTP router → per-adapter control → bus event propagation → SSE update. The absence of #[cfg(test)] in openhome.rs confirmed. Separate Zone struct in app/api.rs:72-77 confirmed. AVAILABLE_ADAPTERS at coordinator.rs:23 confirmed."
